title: The Bad News Bears Go to Japan
original_title: The Bad News Bears Go to Japan
overview: A small time promotor/hustler takes the pint-sized baseball team to Japan for a match against the country's best little league baseball team which sparks off a series of adventures and mishaps the boys come into.
